module:
Chunking service for strategy resolution and management.

This module provides a service layer for chunking operations,
handling strategy resolution, caching, and context-aware processing.

ChunkingContext.docstring:
Context object for chunking operations.
    Used for context-aware strategy creation and parameter injection.
    Inherits common properties from BaseContext for cross-subsystem standardization.

ChunkingService.docstring:
Service for resolving and using chunking strategies.
    
    This service handles the resolution of chunking strategies,
    providing a single point of access for chunking operations with
    advanced caching and context awareness.

get_strategy_for_field.docstring:
Get the appropriate chunking strategy for a field.
        
        This method resolves the chunking strategy based on field and model
        configurations, with appropriate fallbacks.
        
        Args:
            instance: Model instance
            field_name: Name of the field
            
        Returns:
            Configured chunking strategy instance

_resolve_strategy_with_context.docstring:
Resolve strategy using context-aware creation.
        
        Args:
            instance: Model instance
            field_name: Field name
            context: Chunking context
            
        Returns:
            Configured chunking strategy

_resolve_strategy_standard.docstring:
Resolve strategy using standard approach (fallback).
        
        Args:
            instance: Model instance
            field_name: Field name
            
        Returns:
            Configured chunking strategy

chunk_text.docstring:
Chunk text using the appropriate strategy for the field.
        
        Args:
            instance: Model instance
            field_name: Name of the field
            text: Text to chunk
            context: Chunking context for operation (optional)
            max_tokens: Maximum tokens per chunk (optional)
            **options: Additional options for chunking
            
        Returns:
            List of chunk dictionaries

chunk_text_with_context.docstring:
Chunk text using context-aware strategy selection.
        
        Args:
            text: Text to chunk
            context: Chunking context for strategy selection and configuration
            **kwargs: Additional options for chunking
            
        Returns:
            List of chunk dictionaries

_detect_content_type.docstring:
Detect the content type from text.
        
        Args:
            text: Text to analyze
            
        Returns:
            Content type string

_select_strategy_for_context.docstring:
Select the optimal strategy type for a context.
        
        Args:
            context: Chunking context
            
        Returns:
            ChunkingStrategyType enum value
